high.mackenzie.snowflake

Class TreeNode

  • java.lang.Object
    • high.mackenzie.snowflake.AbstractTreeNode
      • high.mackenzie.snowflake.TreeNode
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    ITreeNode, java.lang.Iterable<ITreeNode>

    public final class TreeNode
extends AbstractTreeNode
    An instance of this class is a node in the parse-tree data-structure created via parsing.

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      TreeNode() 

    • Method Summary

      Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      TreeNode[] children()
      This method returns an array that contains the children of this node.
      char[] input()
      This method returns the char[] that is the parser's input.
      java.lang.Iterable<ITreeNode> iterableBFS()
      This method returns a breadth-first-search iterable over the tree rooted at this node.
      java.lang.Iterable<ITreeNode> iterableDFS()
      This method returns a depth-first-search iterable over the tree rooted at this node.
      java.lang.Iterable<ITreeNode> iterableLeavesFirst()
      This method returns a leaves-first iterable over the tree rooted at this node.
      int length()
      This method returns the length of the region of the input that this node covers.
      java.lang.String rule()
      This method returns the name of the rule that created this node.
      int start()
      This method returns the start index of the region of the input that this node covers.

      • Methods inherited from class high.mackenzie.snowflake.AbstractTreeNode

        childAt, childCount, find, findAll, iterator, text, toString

        clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, wait, wait, wait

        public TreeNode()

    • Method Detail

      • children

        public final TreeNode[] children()
        This method returns an array that contains the children of this node.

        Warning: Do NOT modify the returned array!

        Specified by:
        children in interface ITreeNode
        Specified by:
        children in class AbstractTreeNode
        Returns:
        the children of this node, or an empty array, if this node has no children.

      • rule

        public final java.lang.String rule()
        This method returns the name of the rule that created this node.
        Specified by:
        rule in interface ITreeNode
        Specified by:
        rule in class AbstractTreeNode
        Returns:
        the aforedescribed name.

      • start

        public final int start()
        This method returns the start index of the region of the input that this node covers.
        Specified by:
        start in interface ITreeNode
        Specified by:
        start in class AbstractTreeNode
        Returns:
        the index of the first character in the matched region of the parser's input.

      • length

        public final int length()
        This method returns the length of the region of the input that this node covers.
        Specified by:
        length in interface ITreeNode
        Specified by:
        length in class AbstractTreeNode
        Returns:
        the length of the matched region of the parser's input.

      • input

        public final char[] input()
        This method returns the char[] that is the parser's input.

        Warning: Do NOT modify the returned array.

        Specified by:
        input in interface ITreeNode
        Specified by:
        input in class AbstractTreeNode
        Returns:
        the char[] that backs this object.

      • iterableDFS

        public java.lang.Iterable<ITreeNode> iterableDFS()
        This method returns a depth-first-search iterable over the tree rooted at this node.
        Specified by:
        iterableDFS in interface ITreeNode
        Overrides:
        iterableDFS in class AbstractTreeNode
        Returns:
        the aforedescribed iterator.

      • iterableBFS

        public java.lang.Iterable<ITreeNode> iterableBFS()
        This method returns a breadth-first-search iterable over the tree rooted at this node.
        Specified by:
        iterableBFS in interface ITreeNode
        Overrides:
        iterableBFS in class AbstractTreeNode
        Returns:
        the aforedescribed iterator.

      • iterableLeavesFirst

        public java.lang.Iterable<ITreeNode> iterableLeavesFirst()
        This method returns a leaves-first iterable over the tree rooted at this node.

        In other words, this iterator visits all-leafs nodes first, from left to right.

        Specified by:
        iterableLeavesFirst in interface ITreeNode
        Overrides:
        iterableLeavesFirst in class AbstractTreeNode
        Returns:
        the aforedescribed iterator.
